name: vb-design-system-docs
description: Documentation mini-site for @profpowell/vb-design-system (CookSSG, styled by Vanilla Breeze).

scripts.build: npm run prebuild && MINIFY=false cook build
scripts.dev: npm run prebuild && MINIFY=false cook dev
scripts.preview: npm run build && npx http-server dist/pages -p 4321 -c-1
